case_title: CORRIE GREEN VS. MEDICAL COURIERS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-08-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-27-2016. THE APR-27-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR SCOTT DAVID KALKIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-08-2016 THROUGH OCT-06-2016.
